name: Golden Sunbreak
description: Weathering With You — Tokyo bathed in god-ray light. Deep violet-black panels, warm amber gold, soft dust-mote particles.
custom_css: [data-panels-blur] .app-shell { background-color: transparent !important; } [data-panels-blur] .header-bar { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 20; backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) 82%, transparent); } [data-panels-blur] .chat-scroll { padding-top: 3rem; } [data-panels-blur] .status-bar { backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) 82%, transparent); } [data-panels-blur] .border-t.shrink-0:has(form) { backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) 82%, transparent); } [data-panels-blur] .bg-inset { backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.1); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.1); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--inset) 85%, transparent); } [data-panels-blur] .bg-accent { backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.1); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(1.1); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 55%, transparent); } ::selection { background: rgba(255, 192, 48, 0.35); color: #f8e8c8; } ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #c89020; border-radius: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #ffc030; }
